Notes: St. Lawrence used a 13-3 run early in the second half to erase a four point
halftime deficit and take the lead for good.  The Saints were paced by junior
Aliza Bogdanich with 18 points to lead all scorers.  RPI was led by Kaitlyn
Saunders (13 pts, 12 reb), and Kristin Kaczynski with 16 points.
